headline: Autonomy assessment blocked pending on-chain contract verification

rationale.verdict: Assessment blocked: The environment lacks an active web-fetch tool to retrieve the provided DeFiPunkd API endpoints, GitHub repositories, or audit PDFs. Without the ability to verify on-chain state, factory contracts, or external dependencies directly from fetched sources, an autonomy grade cannot be securely determined and no evidence can be cited.

unknowns: A1: Oracle dependencies not verified; cannot read OneWayLendingFactory (0xeA6876DDE9e3467564acBeE1Ed5bac88783205E0) without an active fetch tool.
A2: Keeper or external liquidator requirements not verified.
A3: Underlying asset dependencies and yield sources not verified.
A4: Scope of failure propagation (isolated vs shared risk) not confirmed on-chain.
A9: Dependency upgradeability via DAO Voting (0xE478de485ad2fe566d49342Cbd03E49ed7DB3356) or Ownership Agent (0x40907540d8a6C65c637785e8f8B742ae6b0b9968) not read.
